page_title: Undressing Complementary Plan/Shinji and Good Friends Complete Genga
text:
is an artbook for Eva and Good Friends Undressing Complementary Plan and Shinji and Good Friends video games series by GAINAX. It was published by GAINAX on 11 August 2000.

Overview

Includes all original images, including visuals from the game, as well as those drawn for promotional purposes like covers.

Table of Contents

Eva and Good Friends Undressing Complementary Plan Illustrations p. 01-44
Shinji and Good Friends series Illustrations p. 45-59
